title: astragalus terminalis
intro: Astragalus terminalis, also known as Huang Qi in traditional Chinese medicine, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It is commonly used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus terminalis has been shown to have various health benefits, such as boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried roots, capsules, and teas, making it a popular supplement among those seeking natural remedies for various health conditions.
